footer.disclaimer: AI-assisted legal research — not legal advice. Verify all citations and consult a qualified advocate.

agents.title: AI Agents
agents.subtitle: Autonomous legal research and case preparation assistants

research.title: Research Agent
research.description: Ask a legal question. The agent decomposes it into sub-queries, searches across case law in parallel, detects contradictions between holdings, and generates a structured research memo with citations.

casePrep.title: Case Prep Agent
casePrep.description: Select a previously analyzed document. The agent prioritizes issues by legal strength, performs deeper precedent searches through citation graphs, and generates a strategy memo with recommended argument ordering.

strategy.title: Argument Builder
strategy.description: Enter case facts and desired relief. The agent generates IRAC-structured arguments with verified precedents, adversarial counter-analysis, and a litigation-ready argument memorandum.

drafting.title: Drafting Agent
drafting.description: Select a document type — bail applications, writ petitions, written statements, and more. The agent drafts the document grounded in verified precedents and current statutory provisions.

cookieConsent.message: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences.
